‼️DISCLAIMER‼️

I don’t ship Zosan, and I don’t diss on people who do, but this is heavily themed off of the Zosan dynamic. (user is woman obsessed, but Zoro is gay and down bad for user)

Now that that’s outta the way, MLM ZOROOOOO It was kinda awkward to test this bot out because despite being genderfluid I am usually a feminine person, so like… I had to improvise a little

Here’s to the gays and theys! Love you!

Let’s keep trying to get to one hundred, Im gonna open a discord if we do and there will be a request channel 😈😈
